home.service1Text: Custom interior creation tailored to your RP server needs. Optimized prop placement, clean collision setup, and stable performance for multiplayer environments.
home.service2Text: Custom exterior environments and full area reworks. Zone redesign, immersive detailing, and optimized streaming for high-population servers.
home.service3Text: Performance analysis and improvement of existing maps. Prop cleanup, LOD adjustments, and streaming optimization to ensure smooth gameplay.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Professional mapper & Developer for GTA V / FiveM
about.bio1: I'm a web developer and FiveM mapper focused on creating immersive, performance-optimized environments for roleplay servers. With a strong technical background, I approach mapping not only as visual design, but as a balance between aesthetics, performance, and server stability.
about.bio2: I combine development logic with creative mapping to deliver clean, optimized, and scalable projects tailored to each server's identity. My goal is simple: build environments that look great, feel immersive, and run smoothly even on high-population servers.
about.specialty2Desc: Ensuring smooth gameplay with high FPS
about.tool1Desc: Powerful GTA V map editing software
about.tool2Desc: 3D modeling for detailed interiors and props
about.step1Desc: Initial consultation to understand your needs & vision.
about.step2Desc: Creating a first version of the map for your review.
about.step3Desc: Finalizing and delivering the finished mapping project.
about.step4Desc: Providing ongoing support and assistance post-delivery.

privacy.s1p1: The data controller for personal data collected on this site is Antonin TACCHI, reachable at:
privacy.s2Intro: This site collects the following personal data:
privacy.s2Item1Text: first name, email address, subject of the request, budget, project description. This data is transmitted via Discord Webhook and temporarily stored in our database.
privacy.s2Item2Text: Discord ID, Discord username (if you use the "Connect with Discord" button). This data is used solely to add you to the Discord server.
privacy.s2Item3Text: IP address, browser, pages visited (collected by the host for security and statistics purposes).
privacy.s3Intro: The processing of your data is based on:
privacy.s3Item1: Your consent when submitting the form
privacy.s3Item2: Legitimate interest to respond to your requests
privacy.s3Item3: Performance of a contract in the context of a commission
privacy.s4p1: Contact form data is kept for the duration necessary to process your request, and for a maximum of
privacy.s4p2: Discord data is only used during the OAuth2 connection and is not permanently stored on our servers beyond the associated ticket.
privacy.s5p1: Your personal data is not sold or transferred to third parties. It may be transmitted to the following technical subcontractors, strictly within the scope of their mission:
privacy.s6Intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.s6Item1: Right of access to your data
privacy.s6Item3: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.s6p2: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s6p2After: You may also lodge a complaint with the ICO (Information Commissioner's Office) or your local data protection authority.
privacy.s7p1: This site uses only a technical admin session cookie (refresh_token), which is only active when you are logged into the admin area. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.s7p2: Project favorites are stored in your browser's localStorage, without being transmitted to our servers.

terms.s1p1: These terms of service govern the access to and use of the website antonin-tacchi.com, a portfolio and FiveM mapping commission platform operated by Antonin TACCHI (hereinafter "the Service Provider").
terms.s1p2: By accessing the site or submitting a commission request, you unconditionally accept these terms.
terms.s2Intro: The site offers the following services:
terms.s2Item1: Viewing the FiveM mapping portfolio (MLO, Exterior, YMAP…)
terms.s2Item2: Custom mapping commission requests via the contact form
terms.s2Item3: Access to a community Discord server via OAuth2 integration
terms.s3_1: All commissions begin with a request via the contact form. The Service Provider reserves the right to accept or refuse any request without having to justify the decision.
terms.s3_2: A personalized quote is prepared after reviewing the request. A deposit may be required before work begins. The balance is due upon delivery.
terms.s3_3: Delivery times are indicative and communicated at the time of the quote. The number of included revisions is specified in the quote. Additional revisions may be charged.
terms.s3_4: Upon receipt of full payment, the client obtains a non-exclusive license to use the delivered work for use on a private FiveM server. Any resale, redistribution or publication of the delivered files is strictly prohibited without prior written agreement.
terms.s4Intro: It is prohibited to use this site for:
terms.s4Item2: Sending offensive, defamatory or abusive content through the forms
terms.s4Item3: Attempting to access administrative areas without authorization
terms.s4Item4: Scraping or reproducing portfolio content without authorization
terms.s5p1: The Service Provider cannot be held liable for indirect damages related to the use of the site or the delivered works. The Service Provider's total liability is limited to the amount paid for the relevant commission.
terms.s5p2: The Service Provider does not guarantee the compatibility of the delivered works with future updates to FiveM or third-party servers.
terms.s6p1: The Service Provider reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. The applicable terms are those in force at the date of the commission request.
terms.s7p1: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of the Service Provider's place of residence, after an attempt at amicable resolution.
